posts.author: Carson (Carson Butcher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Looking to understand how you can use monday.com to automate your opportunities? Looking for an end-to-end solution that enables your team to close more deals? You’re in the right place!

Be sure to register for our upcoming joint webinar with monday: Register here

This webinar, How to automate opportunities with monday.com is 100% free and we even have some gifts for those that make it to the end.

In the webinar:

  1. Learn who we are and how we seek to provide value
  2. Get an introduction to Carbon Suites
  3. Dive into the CarbonCRM Suite and learn how to automate your opportunities
  4. Discover the opportunities with custom solutions built in monday.com
  5. Understand the CarbonWeb process and how we work alongside you
  6. Breakdown of monday.com from Shaked Hershkovitz of monday.com
  7. Open Q&A at the end to ask any questions you may have

Excited to see you there! Be sure to register!
